summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Maritime Police Platform - Backend fully functional, Frontend has intermittent login issues

ui_bugs.issue: Intermittent login behavior - sometimes works, sometimes fails with same credentials
ui_bugs.details: Login works inconsistently despite backend API returning 200 status. May be related to frontend authentication state management or timing issues.

integration_issues.issue: Frontend login occasionally fails despite backend API success
integration_issues.details: Backend API login works 100% of the time via direct testing, but frontend shows intermittent failures

passed_tests: Backend: All 18 API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Backend: Authentication with all 4 user accounts (HORTA, PICO, VELAS, ADMIN)
Backend: Fiscalização CRUD operations and statistics
Backend: Services CRUD operations and KPIs
Frontend: Login form elements present and functional
Frontend: Dashboard loads when login succeeds
Frontend: Sidebar navigation with SERVIÇOS and FISCALIZAÇÃO groups
Frontend: Statistics cards showing correct data
Frontend: Form tabs and sticky header functionality
Frontend: Error handling for invalid credentials
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix intermittent login issue in frontend - investigate authentication state management and timing in login flow. Backend is fully functional.
